mapper.sql: g.id, g.user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name, u.role AS user_role, g.department, g.seniority, g.job_tier, g.pay_band, g.job_grade, g.pay_step, g.base_salary, g.currency, g.effective_date, g.memo, g.updated_at

where.if: AND (u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM admin_staff_grade g JOIN users u ON u.id = g.user_id
ORDER BY g.updated_at DESC, g.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_staff_grade g JOIN users u ON u.id = g.user_id

SELECT FROM admin_staff_grade g JOIN users u ON u.id = g.user_id
ORDER BY g.updated_at DESC, g.id DESC

SELECT g.id, u.id AS user_id, u.email AS user_email, u.name AS user_name, u.role AS user_role, g.department, g.seniority, g.job_tier, g.pay_band, g.job_grade, g.pay_step, g.base_salary, g.currency, g.effective_date, g.memo, g.updated_at FROM users u LEFT JOIN admin_staff_grade g ON g.user_id = u.id WHERE u.id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, department, seniority, job_tier, pay_band, job_grade, pay_step, base_salary, currency, effective_date, memo, updated_by, created_at, updated_at FROM admin_staff_grade WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO admin_staff_grade (user_id, department, seniority, job_tier, pay_band, job_grade, pay_step, base_salary, currency, effective_date, memo, updated_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{department}, #{seniority}, #{jobTier}, #{payBand}, #{jobGrade}, #{payStep}, #{baseSalary}, #{currency}, #{effectiveDate}, #{memo}, #{updatedBy}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE department = VALUES(department), seniority = VALUES(seniority), job_tier = VALUES(job_tier), pay_band = VALUES(pay_band), job_grade = VALUES(job_grade), pay_step = VALUES(pay_step), base_salary = VALUES(base_salary), currency = VALUES(currency), effective_date = VALUES(effective_date), memo = VALUES(memo), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_staff_grade_history (user_id, old_values_json, new_values_json, changed_by, source, memo) VALUES (#{userId}, #{oldValuesJson}, #{newValuesJson}, #{changedBy}, #{source}, #{memo})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, old_values_json, new_values_json, changed_by, source, memo, created_at FROM admin_staff_grade_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND role IN ('ADMIN', 'SUPER_ADMIN')
SELECT role FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.email, u.name, u.role, (g.id IS NOT NULL) AS has_grade FROM users u LEFT JOIN admin_staff_grade g ON g.user_id = u.id WHERE u.role IN ('ADMIN', 'SUPER_ADMIN') ORDER BY u.email ASC
